title: hieracium neocerinthe subsp. protocerinthe
intro: Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. protocerinthe is a subspecies of the Hieracium neocerinthe plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. protocerinthe can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
